key_themes: AI基础建设与上游半导体瓶颈
硅光通信与共封装光学（CPO）
记忆体与存储芯片结构性需求
aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近一周在强调AI主题未因市场恐慌改变，并针对META算力缩减传闻及CPO延期报告进行反驳，认为恐慌源自杠杆清算而非基本面，观点仓位维持不变。
representative_quotes: I have conviction that all these themes are backed by structural revenue growth or technological shifts.
One of the dumbest thematic selloffs I’ve seen to to date off: $META compute news that’s not new / CPO delay report 1, that got refuted by $NVDA.
If everything crashes together from $NBIS, $MRVL, $INTC, $SNDK, $AMD, $SIVE, $MU, $LITE, and others... probably doesn't have anything to do with individual fundamentals.

key_themes: 人工智能投资热潮与基础设施支出
市场波动与地缘政治风险
内部人抛售与流动性问题
unusual_whales.recent_shift: 后期更多关注地缘政治事件（如胡塞武装封锁）和宏观经济风险（衰退概率、债券市场紧张），以及ETF等监管限制。
representative_quotes: "Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says the AI boom is still in its early stages, declaring, 'We are at the beginning of the cycle.'"
"Goldman Sachs has said that the $5.3 trillion in AI spending by Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, and Alphabet through 2030 could put pressure on bond markets."
"The last time insider selling reached similar levels was during the dot-com bubble, which was followed by a significant market correction."

key_themes: 存储芯片需求长期看好
玻璃基板技术成为下一代关键
xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从短期波动担忧转为更坚定看多存储和康宁，强调AI长期需求被低估。
representative_quotes: 再牛逼的模型，想把模型实力转化成收入，那你就必须要有海量的内存卡和推理卡
康宁自跟英伟达合作扩产10倍，而康宁股价只涨了25%没翻倍，只能说明市场里的傻瓜太多了
全市场真正唯一害怕的事情就是这些云厂缩减2027年的财务开支，尤其是谷歌亚马逊，它俩家就占了全球总支出一半快4000亿美金
